testcase.name: test_real_scan_produces_bridge_and_chat_turn

failure.message:
AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_cortex_iter26.py:238: in test_real_scan_produces_bridge_and_chat_turn assert seed.status_code == 200, seed.text E AssertionError: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_three_ambiguous_messages_advance_past_discovery
testcase.failure: tests/test_cortex_iter26.py:349: in test_three_ambiguous_messages_advance_past_discovery assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
